violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Large tubes of hamburger were found sitting in water that was at 70-77F. Outer edges of one tube was found at 54F, while the center was still frozen. Discussed running the cold water while the burger, and other items, are thawing in the sink, with the drain slightly pulled to allow water to drain and allow the water to stay cold while items thaw. **Burger, thawing for 1.5 hours, was removed and placed in the walk-in cooler.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. Taco meat, prepared last night, was found in bags in the walk-in cooler at 46.9-50F. Potentially hazardous foods should be cooled from 140F to 70F or below with-in 2 hours and then from 70F to 41F or below with-in the next 4 hours. **Taco meat should be discarded. **Discussed adding ice to the meat to aid in cooling faster.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Garbage can found sitting next to towel dispenser next to the pizza prep area with the can touching towels that were dispensed. Paper towels should be protected from contamination.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Observed food employee handling tomato and lettuce with bare hands for a to-go order. Ready-to-eat foods should be handled with gloves hands or utensils.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the hood ventilation system were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
